data: {"generalSituation":"A trough of low pressure will bring showers and thunderstorms to the coast of Guangdong tomorrow. An easterly airstream is expected to affect the coast of southern China midweek this week. The weather will be brighter over the region, but there will still be one or two showers. Under the influence of troughs of low pressure, the weather over southern China will be unsettled during the Easter holidays and Ching Ming Festival. There will be occasional showers and thunderstorms. With the troughs of low pressure weakening, showers will ease off gradually midweek next week.","weatherForecast":[{"forecastDate":"20260331","week":"Tuesday","forecastWind":"South force 3 to 4, force 5 on high ground.","forecastWeather":"Mainly cloudy with a few showers. Sunny intervals during the day.
